description: Style noteA casual shoe referencing the classic boat shoe for the conservative at heart. The same essence, with different styling in this fortune casual shoe. We recommend wearing this for off-duty dos.Product DetailsBrown blunt toed casual shoe with contrast while sole and laces      Three hole lace-ups and decorative stitch detail on the upperPU midsoleRubber outsole with herringbone grooves and honeycomb lugsMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
